basic note with title
.
!!! note This is a note
    Content inside admonition

    More content
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">This is a note</p>
<p>Content inside admonition</p>
<p>More content</p>
</div>
.

warning with default title
.
!!! warning
    No title given
.
<div class="admonition warning">
<p class="admonition-title">Warning</p>
<p>No title given</p>
</div>
.

empty title ""
.
!!! tip ""
    No title shown
.
<div class="admonition tip">
<p>No title shown</p>
</div>
.

unknown type defaults to note
.
!!! unknown Custom title
    Body
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Custom title</p>
<p>Body</p>
</div>
.

nested admonitions
.
!!! note Outer
    !!! tip Inner
        Nested content

    Back to outer
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Outer</p>
<div class="admonition tip">
<p class="admonition-title">Inner</p>
<p>Nested content</p>
</div>
<p>Back to outer</p>
</div>
.

extended bangs (4+)
.
!!!! danger Watch out
    Body here
.
<div class="admonition danger">
<p class="admonition-title">Watch out</p>
<p>Body here</p>
</div>
.

content after admonition
.
!!! note Title
    Inside

Outside paragraph
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Title</p>
<p>Inside</p>
</div>
<p>Outside paragraph</p>
.

empty admonition body
.
!!! note Title

After
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Title</p>
</div>
<p>After</p>
.

admonition with inline formatting
.
!!! note Title
    **Bold** and *italic* text
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Title</p>
<p><strong>Bold</strong> and <em>italic</em> text</p>
</div>
.

multiple admonitions
.
!!! note First
    Content 1

!!! warning Second
    Content 2
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">First</p>
<p>Content 1</p>
</div>
<div class="admonition warning">
<p class="admonition-title">Second</p>
<p>Content 2</p>
</div>
.

admonition with code inside
.
!!! note Code example
    Some text

        code block

    More text
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Code example</p>
<p>Some text</p>
<pre><code>code block
</code></pre>
<p>More text</p>
</div>
.

admonition with list inside
.
!!! tip Lists
    - item 1
    - item 2
    - item 3
.
<div class="admonition tip">
<p class="admonition-title">Lists</p>
<ul>
<li>item 1</li>
<li>item 2</li>
<li>item 3</li>
</ul>
</div>
.

not admonition - only 2 bangs
.
!! note Not admonition
    Content
.
<p>!! note Not admonition
Content</p>
.

not admonition - indented 4 spaces
.
    !!! note Not admonition
.
<pre><code>!!! note Not admonition
</code></pre>
.

tldr default title
.
!!! tldr
    Summary
.
<div class="admonition tldr">
<p class="admonition-title">TL;DR</p>
<p>Summary</p>
</div>
.

faq default title
.
!!! faq
    Question
.
<div class="admonition faq">
<p class="admonition-title">FAQ</p>
<p>Question</p>
</div>
.

admonition with blockquote inside
.
!!! note Title
    > quoted text
.
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="admonition-title">Title</p>
<blockquote>
<p>quoted text</p>
</blockquote>
</div>
.
